positive: A mesmerizing celestial jungle scene rendered in a deep indigo and emerald color palette. The central subject is a complex, symmetrical mandala composition featuring stylized luminous bioluminescent flora, cosmic swirling nebulae, and gracefully intertwining lunar branches. The style should be a blend of elegant psychedelic art and modern occult engraving, utilizing crisp, high-contrast linework and geometric symmetry. Focus on clean, scalable silhouettes suitable for placement on clothing, with deep void backgrounds and sharp focal points. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, evoking a sense of mystery and tranquility. Hyperdetailed, digital ink drawing, graphic novel aesthetic, high contrast, mystical, harmonious.
